sections.paragraph:
λιπαίνω 1 aor. ἐλίπανα, impv. λιπανάτω. Pass.: fut. 3 sg. λιπανθήσεται Is 34:7 Theod.; aor. 3 sg. ἐλιπάνθη LXX. anoint τὶ someth. (Philo Mech. 61, 37; Philostrat., Imag. 1, 18 p. 320, 18; PGM 36, 212) 1 Cl 56:5 (Ps 140:5).—DELG s.v. λίπα.

aor. aor. = aorist

impv. impv. = imperative

fut. fut. = fut.

  1. sg. = singular

Theod. Theod. = Theodotion, revision of Greek OT, II a.d.—List 2, beg.

LXX LXX = Septuaginta, ed. ARahlfs, unless otherwise specified—Lists 2, beg.

someth. someth. = something

Philo Philo Mech , III–II b.c.—List 5

Philostrat Philostrat = Flavius Philostratus, the Sophist II–III a.d.—List 5

PGM PGM = Papyri Graecae Magicae—List 4

1 Cl 1 Cl = 1 Clement—List 1

DELG DELG = PChantraine, Dictionnaire étymologique de la langue grecque—List 6

s.v. s.v. = sub voce (under the word, look up the word)

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 597
